question_en: Describe your life without formal work experience. What is it like, and why is it important or interesting to you?
grammar_3: There is/are: There are several reasons I like it.|Adjectives: It is quiet, comfortable, and easy to enjoy.|Relative clause: It is a place/activity that helps me relax.
phrases_2: What I like most about it is...|The first thing that comes to mind is...
strategy_kr: 주제의 특징을 2~3가지로 나누어 설명하고, 마지막에 내가 좋아하는 이유를 붙이면 답변이 안정적입니다. 기본정보 주제는 너무 짧게 끝내기 쉬우므로 현재 생활, 준비 중인 것, 앞으로의 계획까지 연결하세요.

question_en: Tell me about your usual routine for managing your daily life without formal work experience. When do you usually do it, and what do you normally do?
grammar_3: Frequency adverbs: I usually do this on weekends.|After -ing: After finishing my work, I spend time on this.|Sequence words: First, I prepare, and then I enjoy it.
phrases_2: My routine is pretty simple.|I usually start by...
strategy_kr: 시간 순서대로 말하면 자연스럽습니다. 언제, 어디서, 무엇을 하는지 순서로 답변하세요. 기본정보 주제는 너무 짧게 끝내기 쉬우므로 현재 생활, 준비 중인 것, 앞으로의 계획까지 연결하세요.

question_en: What do you like most about managing your daily life without formal work experience? Explain your preferences with specific examples.
grammar_3: Prefer to: I prefer to do this when I have free time.|Because: I like it because it helps me relax.|Comparative: It is more comfortable than other options.
phrases_2: Personally, I prefer...|The main reason is that...
strategy_kr: 좋아하는 이유를 하나만 말하지 말고 편리함, 분위기, 감정 중 2가지 이상으로 확장하세요. 기본정보 주제는 너무 짧게 끝내기 쉬우므로 현재 생활, 준비 중인 것, 앞으로의 계획까지 연결하세요.

question_en: Tell me about the last time you spent time managing your daily life without formal work experience. Where were you, who were you with, and what happened?
grammar_3: Past tense: I went there a few months ago.|Past continuous: I was enjoying it when something happened.|Sequence words: First, then, after that, finally.
phrases_2: One experience that comes to mind is...|At first, I thought it would be ordinary, but...
strategy_kr: 언제, 어디서, 누구와, 무슨 일이 있었는지 말한 뒤 느낀 점으로 마무리하면 좋습니다. 기본정보 주제는 너무 짧게 끝내기 쉬우므로 현재 생활, 준비 중인 것, 앞으로의 계획까지 연결하세요.

question_en: Tell me about a memorable experience related to managing your daily life without formal work experience. Why do you still remember it?
grammar_3: Superlative: It was one of the most memorable experiences.|Because: I remember it because it felt special.|Relative clause: It was an experience that stayed in my mind.
phrases_2: What made it memorable was...|I still remember it clearly because...
strategy_kr: 사건 자체보다 왜 기억에 남았는지, 그때 기분이 어땠는지를 강조하면 IH 답변에 가까워집니다. 기본정보 주제는 너무 짧게 끝내기 쉬우므로 현재 생활, 준비 중인 것, 앞으로의 계획까지 연결하세요.

question_en: How has your experience with managing your daily life without formal work experience changed compared to the past? Give specific examples.
grammar_3: Compared to: Compared to the past, things are different now.|Used to: I used to do it differently before.|While: While it was simple in the past, it is more varied now.
phrases_2: There has definitely been a change in...|Compared to a few years ago...
strategy_kr: 과거와 현재를 각각 설명한 뒤, 변화의 이유와 나의 의견을 붙이면 좋습니다. 기본정보 주제는 너무 짧게 끝내기 쉬우므로 현재 생활, 준비 중인 것, 앞으로의 계획까지 연결하세요.

question_en: Tell me about a problem you had while managing your daily life without formal work experience. What happened, and how did you handle the situation?
grammar_3: When clause: When the problem happened, I tried to stay calm.|So: So I decided to solve it step by step.|Past tense: I explained the situation and asked for help.
phrases_2: Things did not go as smoothly as I expected.|Luckily, I was able to handle it by...
strategy_kr: 문제 발생, 나의 대응, 결과, 교훈 순서로 말하면 고난도 문제도 안정적으로 답할 수 있습니다. 기본정보 주제는 너무 짧게 끝내기 쉬우므로 현재 생활, 준비 중인 것, 앞으로의 계획까지 연결하세요.

question_en: I am your friend, and we are going to plan a productive day together. Ask me three or four questions to make a plan.
grammar_3: Indirect question: Could you tell me what time works for you?|Would like to: I would like to know your preference.|Do you have: Do you have any specific plan in mind?
phrases_2: Do you have any preference for...?|Would it be okay if we...?
strategy_kr: 질문 3~4개를 연속으로 하되, 시간, 장소, 선호, 예산 또는 준비물 중에서 골라 물어보세요. 기본정보 주제는 너무 짧게 끝내기 쉬우므로 현재 생활, 준비 중인 것, 앞으로의 계획까지 연결하세요.

question_en: Some people enjoy managing your daily life without formal work experience, while others do not. What is your opinion about this, and why?
grammar_3: In my opinion: In my opinion, it depends on the person.|Although: Although there are some disadvantages, it can be helpful.|If clause: If people use it wisely, it can be positive.
phrases_2: From my point of view...|It really depends on the situation, but...
strategy_kr: 찬반 중 하나만 말하기보다 장점과 단점을 짧게 비교하고 내 입장을 정리하세요. 기본정보 주제는 너무 짧게 끝내기 쉬우므로 현재 생활, 준비 중인 것, 앞으로의 계획까지 연결하세요.

question_en: How have people's habits related to managing your daily life without formal work experience changed these days? Explain the reasons and give examples.
grammar_3: Present perfect: People's habits have changed a lot.|These days: These days, people tend to do it differently.|Due to: Due to technology and lifestyle changes, it has become more common.
phrases_2: This trend has become more common recently.|I think this change is mainly because...
strategy_kr: 개인 경험에서 시작해 사회적 변화나 요즘 트렌드로 확장하면 고득점 답변에 유리합니다. 기본정보 주제는 너무 짧게 끝내기 쉬우므로 현재 생활, 준비 중인 것, 앞으로의 계획까지 연결하세요.

phrases_2: Things did not go as smoothly as I expected.|Luckily, I was able to handle it by...
strategy_kr: 문제 발생, 나의 대응, 결과, 교훈 순서로 말하면 고난도 문제도 안정적으로 답할 수 있습니다. 공연 종류, 무대 분위기, 기억에 남은 장면을 구체적으로 말하면 좋습니다.

question_en: I am your friend, and we are going to choose a performance to watch. Ask me three or four questions to make a plan.
grammar_3: Indirect question: Could you tell me what time works for you?|Would like to: I would like to know your preference.|Do you have: Do you have any specific plan in mind?
phrases_2: Do you have any preference for...?|Would it be okay if we...?
strategy_kr: 질문 3~4개를 연속으로 하되, 시간, 장소, 선호, 예산 또는 준비물 중에서 골라 물어보세요. 공연 종류, 무대 분위기, 기억에 남은 장면을 구체적으로 말하면 좋습니다.

question_en: Some people enjoy watching live performances, while others do not. What is your opinion about this, and why?
grammar_3: In my opinion: In my opinion, it depends on the person.|Although: Although there are some disadvantages, it can be helpful.|If clause: If people use it wisely, it can be positive.
phrases_2: From my point of view...|It really depends on the situation, but...
strategy_kr: 찬반 중 하나만 말하기보다 장점과 단점을 짧게 비교하고 내 입장을 정리하세요. 공연 종류, 무대 분위기, 기억에 남은 장면을 구체적으로 말하면 좋습니다.

question_en: How have people's habits related to watching live performances changed these days? Explain the reasons and give examples.
grammar_3: Present perfect: People's habits have changed a lot.|These days: These days, people tend to do it differently.|Due to: Due to technology and lifestyle changes, it has become more common.
phrases_2: This trend has become more common recently.|I think this change is mainly because...
strategy_kr: 개인 경험에서 시작해 사회적 변화나 요즘 트렌드로 확장하면 고득점 답변에 유리합니다. 공연 종류, 무대 분위기, 기억에 남은 장면을 구체적으로 말하면 좋습니다.

question_en: Describe the kind of music you usually listen to. What is it like, and why is it important or interesting to you?
grammar_3: There is/are: There are several reasons I like it.|Adjectives: It is quiet, comfortable, and easy to enjoy.|Relative clause: It is a place/activity that helps me relax.
phrases_2: What I like most about it is...|The first thing that comes to mind is...
strategy_kr: 주제의 특징을 2~3가지로 나누어 설명하고, 마지막에 내가 좋아하는 이유를 붙이면 답변이 안정적입니다. 좋아하는 장르, 듣는 상황, 음악이 기분에 주는 영향을 연결하세요.

question_en: Tell me about your usual routine for listening to music. When do you usually do it, and what do you normally do?
grammar_3: Frequency adverbs: I usually do this on weekends.|After -ing: After finishing my work, I spend time on this.|Sequence words: First, I prepare, and then I enjoy it.
phrases_2: My routine is pretty simple.|I usually start by...
strategy_kr: 시간 순서대로 말하면 자연스럽습니다. 언제, 어디서, 무엇을 하는지 순서로 답변하세요. 좋아하는 장르, 듣는 상황, 음악이 기분에 주는 영향을 연결하세요.

question_en: What do you like most about listening to music? Explain your preferences with specific examples.
grammar_3: Prefer to: I prefer to do this when I have free time.|Because: I like it because it helps me relax.|Comparative: It is more comfortable than other options.
phrases_2: Personally, I prefer...|The main reason is that...
strategy_kr: 좋아하는 이유를 하나만 말하지 말고 편리함, 분위기, 감정 중 2가지 이상으로 확장하세요. 좋아하는 장르, 듣는 상황, 음악이 기분에 주는 영향을 연결하세요.

question_en: Tell me about the last time you spent time listening to music. Where were you, who were you with, and what happened?
grammar_3: Past tense: I went there a few months ago.|Past continuous: I was enjoying it when something happened.|Sequence words: First, then, after that, finally.
phrases_2: One experience that comes to mind is...|At first, I thought it would be ordinary, but...
strategy_kr: 언제, 어디서, 누구와, 무슨 일이 있었는지 말한 뒤 느낀 점으로 마무리하면 좋습니다. 좋아하는 장르, 듣는 상황, 음악이 기분에 주는 영향을 연결하세요.

question_en: Tell me about a memorable experience related to listening to music. Why do you still remember it?
grammar_3: Superlative: It was one of the most memorable experiences.|Because: I remember it because it felt special.|Relative clause: It was an experience that stayed in my mind.
phrases_2: What made it memorable was...|I still remember it clearly because...
strategy_kr: 사건 자체보다 왜 기억에 남았는지, 그때 기분이 어땠는지를 강조하면 IH 답변에 가까워집니다. 좋아하는 장르, 듣는 상황, 음악이 기분에 주는 영향을 연결하세요.

question_en: How has your experience with listening to music changed compared to the past? Give specific examples.
grammar_3: Compared to: Compared to the past, things are different now.|Used to: I used to do it differently before.|While: While it was simple in the past, it is more varied now.
phrases_2: There has definitely been a change in...|Compared to a few years ago...

question_en: Describe a hiking or trekking place you know. What is it like, and why is it important or interesting to you?
grammar_3: There is/are: There are several reasons I like it.|Adjectives: It is quiet, comfortable, and easy to enjoy.|Relative clause: It is a place/activity that helps me relax.
phrases_2: What I like most about it is...|The first thing that comes to mind is...
strategy_kr: 주제의 특징을 2~3가지로 나누어 설명하고, 마지막에 내가 좋아하는 이유를 붙이면 답변이 안정적입니다. 코스, 준비물, 힘들었던 점, 정상에서의 느낌을 순서대로 말하세요.

question_en: Tell me about your usual routine for hiking or trekking. When do you usually do it, and what do you normally do?
grammar_3: Frequency adverbs: I usually do this on weekends.|After -ing: After finishing my work, I spend time on this.|Sequence words: First, I prepare, and then I enjoy it.
phrases_2: My routine is pretty simple.|I usually start by...

question_en: What do you like most about hiking or trekking? Explain your preferences with specific examples.
grammar_3: Prefer to: I prefer to do this when I have free time.|Because: I like it because it helps me relax.|Comparative: It is more comfortable than other options.
phrases_2: Personally, I prefer...|The main reason is that...

question_en: Tell me about the last time you spent time hiking or trekking. Where were you, who were you with, and what happened?

phrases_2: One experience that comes to mind is...|At first, I thought it would be ordinary, but...

question_en: Tell me about a memorable experience related to hiking or trekking. Why do you still remember it?

question_en: How has your experience with hiking or trekking changed compared to the past? Give specific examples.

grammar_3: Past tense: I went there a few months ago.|Past continuous: I was enjoying it when something happened.|Sequence words: First, then, after that, finally.
phrases_2: One experience that comes to mind is...|At first, I thought it would be ordinary, but...
strategy_kr: 언제, 어디서, 누구와, 무슨 일이 있었는지 말한 뒤 느낀 점으로 마무리하면 좋습니다. 장소, 동행자, 이동수단, 활동, 기억에 남은 이유를 순서대로 말하세요.

question_en: Tell me about a memorable experience related to traveling within your country. Why do you still remember it?

phrases_2: What made it memorable was...|I still remember it clearly because...
strategy_kr: 사건 자체보다 왜 기억에 남았는지, 그때 기분이 어땠는지를 강조하면 IH 답변에 가까워집니다. 장소, 동행자, 이동수단, 활동, 기억에 남은 이유를 순서대로 말하세요.

question_en: How has your experience with traveling within your country changed compared to the past? Give specific examples.
grammar_3: Compared to: Compared to the past, things are different now.|Used to: I used to do it differently before.|While: While it was simple in the past, it is more varied now.

question_en: Tell me about a problem you had while traveling within your country. What happened, and how did you handle the situation?

question_en: How is watching or listening to the news different now compared to the past? Explain the changes with specific examples.
grammar_3: Compared to: Compared to the past, it is more common now.|While: While some people enjoy it outside, others do it at home.|Present perfect: It has changed a lot over time.
phrases_2: Compared to the past, people now tend to...|There has been a big change in...
strategy_kr: 과거와 현재를 나누어 말하고 기술, 생활방식, 사람들의 선호 변화를 연결하세요. 뉴스 주제는 정보 습득 이유, 자주 보는 매체, 최근 기억나는 이슈를 중심으로 말하면 좋습니다.

question_en: Tell me about a problem you had while watching or listening to the news. What happened, and how did you handle it?
grammar_3: Past tense: I had a problem when I did this.|When clause: When I noticed the problem, I tried to fix it.|So: So I asked someone for help.
phrases_2: Things did not go as smoothly as I expected.|Luckily, I was able to solve the problem by...
strategy_kr: 문제 발생, 내가 한 행동, 결과, 느낀 점 순서로 말하면 답변이 안정적입니다. 뉴스 주제는 정보 습득 이유, 자주 보는 매체, 최근 기억나는 이슈를 중심으로 말하면 좋습니다.

question_en: I am your friend, and we are planning to spend time watching or listening to the news. Ask me three or four questions to make a plan.
grammar_3: Indirect question: Could you tell me where it is?|Would like to: I would like to know more about it.|Can I: Can I ask a few questions?
phrases_2: Can I ask you a few questions about...?|Do you have any preference for...?
strategy_kr: 질문 3~4개를 자연스럽게 이어가고 시간, 장소, 비용, 선호도를 묻는 구조가 좋습니다. 뉴스 주제는 정보 습득 이유, 자주 보는 매체, 최근 기억나는 이슈를 중심으로 말하면 좋습니다.

question_en: Some people enjoy watching or listening to the news, while others do not. What is your opinion, and why do you think that way?
grammar_3: I think: I think this activity is useful.|Because: This is important because it helps people relax.|On the other hand: On the other hand, it can have some disadvantages.
phrases_2: From my point of view...|It really depends on the situation, but...
strategy_kr: 찬반 중 한쪽을 고른 뒤 이유 2개와 개인 경험 1개를 붙이면 좋습니다. 뉴스 주제는 정보 습득 이유, 자주 보는 매체, 최근 기억나는 이슈를 중심으로 말하면 좋습니다.

question_en: How have people’s habits related to watching or listening to the news changed these days? Explain the reasons and give examples.
grammar_3: Present perfect: People’s habits have changed a lot.|These days: These days, people tend to do it differently.|Due to: Due to technology and lifestyle changes, it has become more common.
phrases_2: This trend has become more common recently.|I think this change is mainly because...
strategy_kr: 개인 경험에서 시작해 요즘 트렌드나 사회적 변화로 확장하면 고득점 답변에 유리합니다. 뉴스 주제는 정보 습득 이유, 자주 보는 매체, 최근 기억나는 이슈를 중심으로 말하면 좋습니다.

question_en: Describe your experience with going for a drive. What is it like, and what do you usually enjoy about it?
grammar_3: There is/are: There are several things I like about it.|Adjectives: It is relaxing, convenient, and enjoyable.|Relative clause: It is an activity that helps me relax.
phrases_2: What I like most about it is...|The first thing that comes to mind is...
strategy_kr: 주제의 특징을 2~3가지로 나누어 설명하고, 마지막에 내가 좋아하는 이유를 붙이면 답변이 안정적입니다. 드라이브는 목적지, 경로, 기분 전환 효과, 길에서 생긴 일을 함께 말하면 답변이 풍부해집니다.

question_en: Tell me about your usual routine for going for a drive. When do you usually do it, and what do you normally do?
grammar_3: Frequency adverbs: I usually do this on weekends.|After -ing: After finishing my work, I spend time on this.|Sequence words: First, I prepare, and then I enjoy it.

question_en: What do you like most about going for a drive? Explain your preferences with specific examples.

phrases_2: Personally, I prefer...|The main reason is that...

question_en: Tell me about a recent experience you had with going for a drive. Where were you, who were you with, and what happened?

question_en: Some people enjoy reading books, while others do not. What is your opinion, and why do you think that way?
grammar_3: I think: I think this activity is useful.|Because: This is important because it helps people relax.|On the other hand: On the other hand, it can have some disadvantages.
phrases_2: From my point of view...|It really depends on the situation, but...
strategy_kr: 찬반 중 한쪽을 고른 뒤 이유 2개와 개인 경험 1개를 붙이면 좋습니다. 독서는 책 종류, 읽는 시간, 기억나는 책, 독서를 통해 얻은 점을 연결하세요.

question_en: How have people’s habits related to reading books changed these days? Explain the reasons and give examples.
grammar_3: Present perfect: People’s habits have changed a lot.|These days: These days, people tend to do it differently.|Due to: Due to technology and lifestyle changes, it has become more common.
phrases_2: This trend has become more common recently.|I think this change is mainly because...
strategy_kr: 개인 경험에서 시작해 요즘 트렌드나 사회적 변화로 확장하면 고득점 답변에 유리합니다. 독서는 책 종류, 읽는 시간, 기억나는 책, 독서를 통해 얻은 점을 연결하세요.

question_en: Describe your experience with taking photos. What is it like, and what do you usually enjoy about it?
grammar_3: There is/are: There are several things I like about it.|Adjectives: It is relaxing, convenient, and enjoyable.|Relative clause: It is an activity that helps me relax.

question_en: Tell me about your usual routine for taking photos. When do you usually do it, and what do you normally do?

question_en: Tell me about your usual routine for playing games. When do you usually do it, and what do you normally do?

phrases_2: My routine is pretty simple.|I usually start by...

question_en: What do you like most about playing games? Explain your preferences with specific examples.

question_en: Tell me about a recent experience you had with playing games. Where were you, who were you with, and what happened?
grammar_3: Past tense: I did this last month.|Sequence words: First, I arrived, and then I looked around.|Because: I remember it because it was special.
phrases_2: One experience that comes to mind is...|The best part of that experience was...
strategy_kr: 언제, 어디서, 누구와, 무엇을 했는지 말한 뒤 기억에 남은 이유를 붙이세요. 게임은 장르, 플레이 방식, 친구와의 경험, 장단점을 균형 있게 말하면 좋습니다.

question_en: Tell me about a memorable time when you were playing games. Why was that experience special to you?

phrases_2: What made it memorable was...|I still remember it clearly because...

question_en: How is playing games different now compared to the past? Explain the changes with specific examples.
grammar_3: Compared to: Compared to the past, it is more common now.|While: While some people enjoy it outside, others do it at home.|Present perfect: It has changed a lot over time.

question_en: Tell me about a memorable time when you were visiting museums. Why was that experience special to you?
grammar_3: Past tense: It happened a few months ago.|Relative clause: It was an experience that I still remember.|So: I was tired, so I took a short break.
phrases_2: What made it memorable was...|I still remember it clearly because...
strategy_kr: 사건 자체보다 왜 기억에 남았는지, 그때의 감정이 어땠는지를 강조하세요. 박물관은 전시 내용, 분위기, 배운 점, 기억에 남는 작품을 말하면 좋습니다.

question_en: How is visiting museums different now compared to the past? Explain the changes with specific examples.
grammar_3: Compared to: Compared to the past, it is more common now.|While: While some people enjoy it outside, others do it at home.|Present perfect: It has changed a lot over time.
phrases_2: Compared to the past, people now tend to...|There has been a big change in...
strategy_kr: 과거와 현재를 나누어 말하고 기술, 생활방식, 사람들의 선호 변화를 연결하세요. 박물관은 전시 내용, 분위기, 배운 점, 기억에 남는 작품을 말하면 좋습니다.

question_en: Tell me about a problem you had while visiting museums. What happened, and how did you handle it?
grammar_3: Past tense: I had a problem when I did this.|When clause: When I noticed the problem, I tried to fix it.|So: So I asked someone for help.
phrases_2: Things did not go as smoothly as I expected.|Luckily, I was able to solve the problem by...
strategy_kr: 문제 발생, 내가 한 행동, 결과, 느낀 점 순서로 말하면 답변이 안정적입니다. 박물관은 전시 내용, 분위기, 배운 점, 기억에 남는 작품을 말하면 좋습니다.

question_en: I am your friend, and we are planning to spend time visiting museums. Ask me three or four questions to make a plan.
grammar_3: Indirect question: Could you tell me where it is?|Would like to: I would like to know more about it.|Can I: Can I ask a few questions?
phrases_2: Can I ask you a few questions about...?|Do you have any preference for...?
strategy_kr: 질문 3~4개를 자연스럽게 이어가고 시간, 장소, 비용, 선호도를 묻는 구조가 좋습니다. 박물관은 전시 내용, 분위기, 배운 점, 기억에 남는 작품을 말하면 좋습니다.

question_en: Some people enjoy visiting museums, while others do not. What is your opinion, and why do you think that way?
grammar_3: I think: I think this activity is useful.|Because: This is important because it helps people relax.|On the other hand: On the other hand, it can have some disadvantages.
phrases_2: From my point of view...|It really depends on the situation, but...
strategy_kr: 찬반 중 한쪽을 고른 뒤 이유 2개와 개인 경험 1개를 붙이면 좋습니다. 박물관은 전시 내용, 분위기, 배운 점, 기억에 남는 작품을 말하면 좋습니다.

question_en: How have people’s habits related to visiting museums changed these days? Explain the reasons and give examples.
grammar_3: Present perfect: People’s habits have changed a lot.|These days: These days, people tend to do it differently.|Due to: Due to technology and lifestyle changes, it has become more common.
phrases_2: This trend has become more common recently.|I think this change is mainly because...
strategy_kr: 개인 경험에서 시작해 요즘 트렌드나 사회적 변화로 확장하면 고득점 답변에 유리합니다. 박물관은 전시 내용, 분위기, 배운 점, 기억에 남는 작품을 말하면 좋습니다.

question_en: Describe your experience with going camping. What is it like, and what do you usually enjoy about it?
